title: Palak Paneer

subs.name: firm tofu (drained and pressed) for a dairy-free version; fry until golden in the same way
frozen spinach thawed and drained; skip the blanching step
2 tbsp cashew paste blended with 3 tbsp water for a dairy-free richness
ghee deepens the flavour; same quantity

steps.text: Bring a large pot of water to a boil. Add the spinach and blanch for 2 minutes until wilted but still bright green. Drain and immediately transfer to a bowl of cold water to stop the cooking. Drain again and blend with the green chillies into a smooth puree using a mixie or blender. Set aside.

Heat 1 tbsp oil in a kadai over medium-high flame. Fry the paneer cubes in a single layer, turning, until golden on at least two sides — about 3 minutes. Remove to a plate; soaking in warm salted water for 5 minutes keeps them soft while you finish the sauce.
In the same kadai, heat the remaining oil and 1 tbsp butter over medium flame. Splutter the cumin seeds, then add the onion and fry until golden, about 5 minutes.

Add the ginger-garlic paste and cook until fragrant. Add the tomatoes and cook until softened and the oil separates, about 5 minutes. Add red chilli powder, turmeric and a pinch of salt; stir 30 seconds.
Pour in the spinach puree and stir well. Simmer on medium flame for 5 minutes — the sauce should turn a rich, deep green. Add 50 ml water if it looks too thick.
Drain the paneer, add it to the sauce and stir gently to coat. Simmer 2 more minutes. Stir in the remaining butter, cream and garam masala. Taste for salt and serve with roti, naan or rice.

cross_contact_notes: Ingredient metadata cannot prove an allergen-free kitchen. Check packaged labels and cross-contact statements for your products.

substitution_notes: paneer → firm tofu (drained and pressed) for a dairy-free version; fry until golden in the same way; cream → 2 tbsp cashew paste blended with 3 tbsp water for a dairy-free richness; spinach → frozen spinach thawed and drained; skip the blanching step; butter → ghee deepens the flavour; same quantity
